items.name: GMCH – Senior Resident, CMO and More – 77 Posts

basic_details.job_title: GMCH Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 77 Senior Resident, CMO and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh (GMCH) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 77 Senior Resident, CMO and More. Candidates with DNB, MS/MD, M.Ch, DM Can Apply Offline. The Offline application opens on 21-05-2026, and closes on 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply Offline through GMCH website, gmch.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Establishment Branch-II, Government Medical College & Hospital, Chandigarh
basic_details.post_name: Senior Resident, CMO (General Medicine & General Surgery), Resident Anaesthetist, Resident Pathologist
basic_details.job_type: Tenure Post - 06 months (extendable as per Selection Committee recommendation)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline - Prescribed application form to be submitted in person at Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate Medical Degree i.e. (MD/MS/DNB/MCh/DM) or equivalent in the concerned specialty, recognized by MCI and registered either with Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 67,700/- (minimum pay 1st Cell of Level-11) + NPA @ 20% as per Central Government Services (R. Pay) Rules 2016

how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in-Interview recruitment. No online application or postal application is accepted. Candidates must obtain the prescribed application form from the official website of GMCH, fill it up duly, and submit it in person at the Establishment Branch-II, Block-D, GMCH-32, Chandigarh on 25-05-2026 before 11:00 A.M. along with the requisite application fee and testimonials.
seo_tags: Government Medical College & Hospital Chandigarh Senior Resident

basic_details.short_information: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of . Candidates with Graduate, MBA/PGDM Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited official website ncdc.in.

basic_details.job_title: IRCTC Hospitality Monitor Recruitment 2026 Notification Out – Walk in for 92 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) Recruitment 2026 for 92 posts of Hospitality Monitor. Candidates with B.B.A, B.Sc, MBA/PGDM Can attend the walkin. The Walk-in starts from 03-06-2026, and ends on 24-06-2026. For detailed information please visit IRCTC official website, irctc.com.
basic_details.organization_name: Rs. 350/- per day (100% for more than 12 hours; 70% for 6 to 12 hours; 30% for less than 6 hours)

selection_process: Personal Interview based on credentials and performance
how_to_apply: Candidates are required to fill in the application form (Proforma attached with the official notification) duly complete in all respects and submit it at the venue of the walk-in interview. No online application process is involved - candidates must appear in person at any one of the listed venues on the specified dates. The completed application form has to be submitted at the venue for verification along with original documents, one set of attested copies of requisite documents, and two recent passport size photographs.
seo_tags: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Hospitality Monitor Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: NVS Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 116 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NVS Chandigarh Recruitment 2026: Get latest NVS Chandigarh recruitment notification 2026 for 116 Hostel Superintendent vacancies. Apply online from 13 May 2026 to 25 May 2026 through the official NVS Chandigarh career portal.

qualification.education_qualification: (a) Master's degree / B.Ed; (b) Proficiency in regional language (verified during personal talk; no documentary evidence required)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the portal https://www.supschooms.in. No other mode of application is accepted. The portal is active from 13.05.2026 to 25.05.2026. Candidates must use a correct and working email ID and mobile number; the registered email ID and mobile number should remain valid as all communications including shortlisting intimation and Personal Talk details will be sent to the registered email ID. All information filled in the form will be treated as final; if found false/wrong/misleading at any stage, the candidature will be rejected. Candidates are advised to visit the NVS RO Chandigarh website regularly for updates.
seo_tags: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Chandigarh Hostel Superintendent Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh Stringer/ Cameramen Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 for post of Stringer/ Cameramen. Candidates with Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with experience in visual coverage, cinematography/videography/news gathering/broadcast journalism, and equipped with four-wheel vehicles.

salary_details.pay_scale: Local coverage: Rs. 1500 for 6 hours, Rs. 1000 for additional 6 hours. Outstation coverage: Rs. 1800.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Doordarshan Kendra Chandigarh Stringer/ Cameramen Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.

basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Medical Officers Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) Recruitment 2026 for 5 posts of Medical Officers. Candidates with MBBS can attend walkin. The Walk-in on 25-05-2026. For detailed information please visit NHM Chandigarh official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship, Registered with State Medical Council or Medical Council of India-New Delhi, One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience
